description.value:
Receive Prescription processing vvv-geaccepteerd building blocks for patient J. de XXX_Wit
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 23.5a afhandelen voorschrift t.b.v. VVV <span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full xforms-visited" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group xforms-visited" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group xforms-visited" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group xforms-visited" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙21"><span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙16">TEST Scenarioset 23.5a afhandelen voorschrift t.b.v. 100% akkoord VVV met eerdere verstrekking
Receive Prescription processing vvv-geaccepteerd resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '2115468') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '6947') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '19429') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '2115468') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '6947') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '19429') ))).where((quantity.value = 6)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '2115468|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (METOCLOPRAMIDE HCL ACCORD TABLET 10MG)
